about:
Hi, I'm Soren. I recently graduated from the Master's program in Natural Language Processing at UC Santa Cruz, where I also TA'd courses in AI and Information Systems.

I'm currently a Founding Engineer at Levangie Laboratories, working on agent-based AI systems that are autonomous, reliable, and grounded in real-world use cases. I've previously worked across backend infrastructure, product design, and prototyping at Gray Whale and Onda Sports, and developed features for the surf marketplace app Boardal.

I love collaborating on practical, high-agency projects at the intersection of NLP, product, and systems. Always happy to connect about AI agents, developer tools, or surfing.
